string 2:
Hey, help a guy out, here... I need a hand. It's my
hammer... my precious hammer!

Ah, you're here! I wasn't sure if you'd actually come or
not. Anyway, listen closely.

My hammer is my life... and now it's broken! It's chipped
really bad.

I usually take good care of it, but... I got a little
carried away while working.
{next}Always sad when a beloved tool breaks.
{next}Is there any way to fix it?
{next}I'll get you another one!

So you understand my pain! We craftsmen pour our souls into
our tools, after all.

Actually, that's why I called you here. I was hoping we
could discuss repairing my hammer.

That's very kind, but I'm afraid for me, it's my trusty
hammer here or nothing at all.

But there's still a way to fix my hammer. All I need is
some Chrondigizoit Metal.

It's quite the rarity, though. About the only place you'll
find it is the Factorial Area.

You got that area under control, right? Would you mind going
to have a look for me?
{next}Sure. Just sit tight.
{next}I'll look, but that's it.
{end}I can't go right now.
Thanks! And rest assured I'll make it worth your while!

I was hoping you'd do more than just look. Maybe actually
find it and bring it back?

That's too bad, but I know you're busy, too. Come see me
once your schedule opens up!

So, got some time now? I was hoping you could help with
finding some Chrondigizoit Metal.
{next}You got it.
{end}I still can't.
Oh, so you'll do it? Thanks a lot!
All right. Come back when you've got time. I'll be here!

Okay, your destination is the Factorial Area, and you're
looking for Chrondigizoit Metal.
If you find any, see if you can get me a little bit.

Once I have that Chrondigizoit Metal, I can manage the rest.
Happy hunting!

Hey, is that Chrondigizoit Metal I see?! Well, give 'er here.
Now I can fix my hammer!

This hammer is my partner in work and in battle. Without it,
I might as well be dead.

Which means, I pretty much owe you my life. Here. Take this. 
It's the least I can do.

Now I can keep hammering away! I'm planning to make lots of
stuff, so stay tuned!

I'd love to go to the reactor someday. Making things with
Vulcanusmon would be so cool!
